science.title: Mutant clownfish reveals how nature draws boundaries
science.description: In 1999, a clownfish (Amphiprion ocellaris) hatched in the aquarium of a tropical fish hobbyist in the UK. These clownfish are prized by aquarists for their unique pattern of three straight white bars bordered by a thin black line. But this UK fish was special: instead of the usual straight bars, it had wavy, corrugated patterns, symmetrical on both sides. The patterns were inherited across generations, leading to a lineage named "Snowflake," but the mechanism causing this irregular patterning remained a mystery.

ai.title: Schneider Electric bets big on India’s energy shift with 30+ launches at Innovation Summit 2026
ai.description: Schneider Electric used its Innovation Summit India 2026 to outline an ambitious strategy for Indias rapidly evolving energy landscape, unveiling over 30 new solutions across infrastructure, industry, data centres, and homes. The company emphasised the growing convergence of AI, electrification, and digitalisation, positioning software-driven, predictive energy systems as the future. From grid modernisation and industrial platforms to AI-ready data centre designs and smart home innovations, the focus remained on efficiency, resilience, and intelligent control.
